input: Score my life domains: career is going great (9/10), but health is neglected (3/10), relationships are okay (6/10), and I haven't learned anything new in months (2/10). What do I do?
Generate a weekly plan that balances my fitness goals, career deadlines, and relationship maintenance.
How should a monthly review work? What should I reflect on and what should I adjust?
I'm optimizing career at the expense of everything else. How do I detect and correct this pattern?
Which sub-skills should Life OS orchestrate and how do they connect?
